nasb.text: But rather, you are to tear down their altars and smash their sacred pillars and cut down their Asherim

esv.text: You shall tear down their altars and break their pillars and cut down their Asherim

cnv.text: 他們的祭壇你們卻要拆毀，他們的柱像你們要打碎，他們的亞舍拉你們要砍下。

ccb.text: 相反，要拆掉他们的祭坛，打碎他们的神柱，砍掉他们的亚舍拉神像。
